variables.name: GON_VF
variables.description: Glaucomatous optic neuropathy confirmed by visual field  1:Yes, 2:No, 999: Missing

variables.name: IOP>21
variables.description: Untreated IOP OD or OS >= 21  1: Yes, 2: No, 999: Missing

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Whole exome sequencing de-identified subject ID

variables.name: agedxc>30
variables.description: Age at glaucoma diagnosis >= 30 years old  1: Yes, 2: No, 999: Missing

variables.name: caco
variables.description: Case (Glaucoma) or control status  1: Control, 2: Case, 999: Other

variables.name: dmhx
variables.description: Report of ever diabetes mellitus  1: Yes, 2: No, 999:  Missing

variables.name: gender
variables.description: Gender  1: Male, 2: Female, 999: Missing

variables.name: htnhx
variables.description: Report of ever systemic hypertension  1: Yes, 2: No, 999: Missing

variables.name: probes
variables.description: Exome capture probes applied to DNA during library preparation V2:Nimblegen v2, V3:Nimblegen v3, 999: Missing

variables.name: spheq<-3.00
variables.description: Spherical equivalent OD or OS <= -3.00 from distance refraction at time closest to DNA collection. (If pt is pseudophakic  use phakic refraction)  1: Yes, 2: No, 999: Missing

variables.name: vCDR>0.8
variables.description: Vertical cup disc ratio OD or OS >=0.8  (range 0.0-1.0)  1: Yes, 2: No, 999: Missing
